texto: Let's teach that loving isn't always loving. Like when you loved the hamster so much that it died. Some adults do that too. Too much, the wrong way. These are 'Stay away' zones on your body. These are 'Stay away' people. You don't have to obey all adults. Not even parents. Disagree respectfully. Run, if you need. Shout, if you need. Adults can be bad too.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Deborah Ainslie: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Let's teach that loving isn't always loving. Like when you loved the hamster so much that it died…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, adults, children pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de children e hamsters.
